description: HBM traffic analysis for fused paged TQ4 decode kernel vs decompress-all reference path

per_token_byte_layout.note: Per-token across all 4 KV heads: H_KV * (D/2 + 4) * 2 = 4 * (64 + 4) * 2 = 544

fused_path.description: Single fused kernel reads compressed blocks directly from page table, decompresses in SRAM
fused_path.breakdown: 136 = 2 * 68 (K compressed read + V compressed read per KV head pair)

reference_path.description: Decompress-all to HBM temp buffer, then Flash Attention reads decompressed cache
reference_path.breakdown: 1160 = 136 (read compressed) + 512 (write FP16 K+V) + 512 (re-read FP16 K+V for FA)

comparison.note: 8.53x HBM bandwidth reduction. Since decode attention is deeply memory-bound (arithmetic intensity 27.2 FLOPs/byte vs RTX 4090 ridge point 327 FLOPs/byte), this translates directly to wall-clock speedup.
